notes:
v2.6.60 — Charts now show the exact line the bot trades

- Dashboard trendlines now come from the SAME engine that decides entries
  (previously the drawn line was a separate look-alike, not the traded line)
- A line is hidden the moment the engine would ignore it: price >3xATR away,
  aged out, or the breakout already consumed
- This removes the stale steep lines that used to linger on M30/H1/M15
- What you see on the chart = what the bot actually acts on
- Uses your bt_tl_quality_min setting so drawn + traded acceptance match
